name: Truffle Mushroom Swiss Burger
description: Premium beef patty topped with sautéed portobello mushrooms, swiss cheese, and truffle aioli.

name: BBQ Pulled Pork Pizza
description: Slow-cooked pulled pork, red onions, cilantro, and a tangy BBQ sauce base.

name: Classic Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce, garlic croutons, and parmesan shavings with house-made dressing.

name: Spicy Salmon Sushi Roll
description: Fresh Atlantic salmon, cucumber, and spicy mayo topped with sesame seeds.

name: Penne Alfredo
description: Penne pasta tossed in a rich, creamy parmesan white sauce with garlic herbs.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Smashed avocado on sourdough bread with chili flakes and a poached egg.

name: Crispy Fish Tacos
description: Beer-battered cod served in soft tortillas with slaw and lime crema.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken pieces in a spiced tomato-based curry sauce.

name: Greek Mezze Platter
description: Hummus, tzatziki, olives, and pita bread for sharing.

name: Loaded Nachos
description: Tortilla chips topped with melted cheese, jalapeños, salsa, and sour cream.

name: New York Cheesecake
description: Classic creamy cheesecake with a graham cracker crust and berry coulis.

name: Pesto Grilled Chicken
description: Grilled chicken breast glazed with basil pesto served with roast veggies.

name: Blueberry Pancakes
description: Fluffy pancakes loaded with fresh blueberries and maple syrup.

name: Iced Matcha Latte
description: Premium ceremonial grade matcha whisked with chilled oat milk.

name: Double Bacon Cheeseburger
description: Two beef patties, double cheddar cheese, and crispy smoked bacon.

name: Veggie Spring Rolls
description: Crispy fried rolls stuffed with glass noodles and mixed vegetables.

name: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
description: Nutritious bowl with quinoa, roasted chickpeas, kale, and tahini dressing.

name: Tiramisu
description: Authentic Italian dessert with coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone.

name: Buffalo Wings
description: Spicy chicken wings served with celery sticks and blue cheese dip.

name: Chocolate Fudge Brownie
description: Warm, gooey chocolate brownie served with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream.
